title: Spicy Chewy Moroccan Spaghetti Tagine
description: A keto-friendly, spicy and chewy tagine-style spaghetti dish thats perfect for meal prep.
instructions: Rinse and drain the shirataki spaghetti, then boil for 2 minutes; set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium‑high heat. Add the ground beef, breaking it apart with a spatula, and cook until browned, draining excess fat.
Add the diced bell pepper and chopped onion to the skillet; sauté for 4 minutes until softened.
Stir in the minced garlic and cook for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add the crushed tomatoes, Moroccan spice blend, cayenne pepper, and a pinch of salt and pepper. Stir and bring to a gentle simmer.
Pour in the beef broth, reduce the heat to low, cover, and let braise for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the cooked shirataki spaghetti to the pot, stir to coat it with the sauce, and cook for an additional 3–4 minutes until heated through.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed. Serve hot, garnished with freshly chopped cilantro or parsley.
